title: Fuel the Burn: Best L-Carnitine Supplements of 2026
description: L-carnitine helps your body shuttle fat into cells for energy, but not every bottle on the shelf delivers a real dose. Here are 5 L-carnitine picks actually worth buying in 2026. Read the guide -> #lcarnitine #fatloss #weightmanagement #supplementguide #fitnessscience #gymlife
